title: Seal Upon My Heart

sections.label: Intro
lines: (Softly)
Whisper my name in the hush of the dawn,
Like a river that knows where the ocean is drawn.
I have searched through the ages, through shadow and light,
Yet still, I find you—my soul's sacred flight.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lay me as a seal upon your heart,
A vow unbroken, a love set apart.
Like fire on stone, it cannot erase,
Stronger than death, its embers embrace.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Many waters cannot quench its flame,
Raging storms cannot call it by name.
Love is a force beyond stars above,
A promise unshaken, a destiny wove.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (Full orchestra swells)
For love is the flame that time cannot sever,
The bond of the heavens, a thread bound forever.
Through all of the ages, through night and through day,
My heart will be yours till the stars fade away.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Who is this rising from the wilderness fair?
Leaning on love, as dawn paints the air.
Under the apple tree, there you were mine,
Rooted in promise, by fate's own design.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: No wealth of the earth, no kingdom or throne,
Could purchase this love—it is priceless alone.
For love, like the dawn, will never grow cold,
A fire eternal, a story retold.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: For love is the flame that time cannot sever,
The bond of the heavens, a thread bound forever.
Through all of the ages, through night and through day,
My heart will be yours till the stars fade away.
Till the stars fade away...
Till the stars fade away...
I am yours, evermore.

epigraph: Set me as a seal upon thine heart
lyricEyebrow: From the Book of Song of Songs
